Correction_Edit_Answer_Desc: When users ask this question, this answer will be used directly.
Correction_Annotate_Knowledge_Desc: Add this question to the index of selected knowledge to assist retrieval when asked again. More comprehensive annotations yield better results.
fetch_app_datasets_error: Failed to fetch associated knowledge bases
HTTPTools_Create_Type_Tip: Modification is not supported after selection
MCP_tools_list_is_empty: Failed to parse the MCP address.
MCP_tools_parse_failed: Failed to parse the MCP address.
MCP_tools_url_placeholder: Enter the MCP address and then click Parse
Optimizer_CloseConfirmText: This operation will discard the optimization result. Would you like to proceed?
Optimizer_Placeholder: Enter your suggestions for how to optimize prompts
app.error.publish_unExist_app: Failed to publish the app. Please check whether tools are called properly.
app.error.unExist_app: Some components are missing. Please delete them.
app.version_publish_tips: This version will be saved to the cloud, and be updated to all team members and all publishing channels.
auto_execute_default_prompt_placeholder: Default questions will be sent during auto execution.
auto_execute_tip: If enabled, the workflow will be automatically executed when users enter the chat interface. Execution order: 1. Opening remarks. 2. Global variables. 3. App auto execution.
chat_logs_tips: The logs record online chats, shared chats, and API-based chats (chat ID is required) in the app.
code_function_describe: Describe your code function, enter "/" to select the variable
confirm_copy_app_tip: An app with the same configuration except for permissions will be created. Would you like to proceed?
confirm_del_app_tip: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}} and its chat records?
confirm_del_tool_tip:
Confirm to delete this tool? 
Deleting a tool will delete its associated conversation records, and the Agent that uses the tool may not function properly.
confirm_delete_chat_content: Are you sure you want to delete this chat? This action cannot be undone!
confirm_delete_chats:
Are you sure you want to delete {{n}} conversation records? 
The records will be permanently deleted!
confirm_delete_folder_tip: Are you sure you want to delete the folder? All apps and chat records in the folder will also be deleted. Would you like to proceed?
copilot_confirm_message:
The original configuration has been received to understand the current code structure and input and output parameters. 
Please explain your optimization requirements.
custom_plugin_associated_plugin_placehol: Enter plugin name or appId to search
custom_plugin_duplicate_tip: Confirm that the import will overwrite the original resources
custom_plugin_intro_placeholder: Add an introduction for this application
custom_plugin_tags_max_limit: You can only select up to 3 tags
dataset.Select_dataset_model_tip: Only knowledge bases with the same index model can be selected
dataset.create_dataset_tips: For more advanced operations, please go to
dataset_create_success: The knowledge base was created successfully and files are being indexed in the background.
dataset_empty_tips: You don’t have a knowledge base yet, create one first.
dataset_search_tool_description: Uses semantic, full-text, and database search capabilities to search for reference materials related to the questions from the selected knowledge bases.
document_quote_tip: Use documents uploaded by users for references (document parsing is required). It can also be used to reference other string entries.
empty_tool_tips: Please add tools on the left side
export_filtered_sensitive_config_success: The configuration has been copied, and some sensitive information has been automatically filtered out. Please check if any sensitive data still exists.
export_config_successful: Configuration copied, sensitive information retained. Please note the security of the configuration information.
file_recover: The file will overwrite the existing content.
file_upload_tip: If enabled, you can upload documents and images. Documents are retained for 7 days, while images for 15 days. Using this feature may generate significant additional costs. To ensure optimal user experience, please select a model that supports a longer context length.
has_no_create_per: You do not have permission to create in the current directory.
http_toolset_add_tips: Click the "Add" button to add tools
import_configs_failed: Failed to import the configuration. Please make sure that the configuration file is valid.
input_params_tips: Tool input parameters will not be passed directly to the request URL; they can be referenced on the right side using "/".
invalid_json_format: Please upload a valid JSON file.
llm_not_support_vision: Not supported by the current model
llm_use_vision_tip: Select a model and then check whether it supports image recognition. If it is enabled, the model will read image contents from file links, and automatically parse images in the question if a question is less than 500 characters.
logs_chat_count_description: The total number of new conversations created in the app. A new conversation is created if the interval between the new message and the last message exceeds 15 minutes. (This definition only applies here.)
logs_chat_item_count_description: The total number of chats created in the app. A chat is a round of workflow execution.
logs_error_rate_description: The proportion of chats that encountered error to total chats
logs_export_confirm_tip: The total number of chat records is {{total}}. Up to 100 latest messages can be exported from a chat. Would you like to proceed?
logs_export_title: Time, Source, User, Contact info, Topic, Total messages, Positive feedback, Negative feedback, Custom feedback, Marked answers, Chat details
logs_points_per_chat_description: Avg credits consumed per workflow execution
logs_total_tips: Cumulative metrics are not affected by the time filter.
logs_user_count_description: The number of daily users who created chats in the app
logs_user_feedback_description:
Likes: Number of user likes
Dislikes: Number of user dislikes
logs_user_retention_description: The number of new users in period T who were active in period T+1
max_histories_number_tip: The maximum number of chats that a model can remember. If a chat exceeds the max context length, the system will automatically delete the excess part. Therefore, the model may not actually remember 30 chats even if this field is set to 30.
module.Custom Title Tip: The topic will be displayed in the chat.
move.hint: If moved, the app or folder will inherit the permissions of the destination folder, invalidating its current permissions.
no_mcp_tools_list: No data available. The MCP address must be parsed first.
open_vision_function_tip: A model with a switch toggled on, as shown below, supports image recognition. If enabled, the model will automatically parse images from file links and images in the questions with less than 500 characters.
or_drag_JSON: Drag & drop to upload JSON file
paste_config_or_drag: Paste configuration or drag & drop a JSON file here
pdf_enhance_parse_tips: Call a PDF recognition model to parse PDF files, converting them into Markdown format with images preserved, and to process scanned copies of PDF files, which takes longer time.
permission.des.manage: Has write permission and can configure publishing channels, view chat logs, and assign app permissions.
plugin_cost_folder_tip: The toolkit contains multiple tools. The credits are consumed based on the tools used.
plugin_dispatch_tip:
Enable the model to obtain external data. The model will automatically call tools as needed, and run them in non-streaming mode.
Associated knowledge bases will be considered special tools.
plugin_offline_tips:
Your system does not have direct access to plugin market data,

Please manually copy the URL and go to get more plugins
pro_modal_feature_1: Connection to external organizations and multi-tenancy
pro_modal_subtitle: Subscribe to the commercial edition for advanced features
publish.chat_desc: After logging into the portal, users can talk directly to the application
question_guide_tip: Three relevant question suggestions will be automatically generated for you after the conversation.
saved_success: Changes saved successfully. To make the version available to others, please click Save and publish.
show_top_p_tip: Nucleus sampling is an alternative to temperature sampling. By using this method, the model considers only tokens whose cumulative probability exceeds p. For example, if p is set to 0.1, the model will consider only tokens with the highest cumulative probability. Default value: 1.
simple_tool_tips: The plugin cannot be called by simple apps because it contains special inputs.
stop_sign_placeholder: Separate multiple sequences with the pipe character (|). Example: aaa|stop
stream_response_tip: If disabled, the model will not output contents immediately, but wait until the entire response is generated. Therefore, it can obtain the output contents for further processing.
sync_log_keys_popover_text: The field configuration will apply only to your account. Would you like to save it as the team configuration?
systemval_conflict_globalval: The variable name conflicts with a system variable name. Please use another one.
temperature_tip: Range: 0-10 A higher value leads to more creative outputs, while a lower value leads to more deterministic outputs.
template.hard_strict_des: Enforces stricter requirements on the model's answers based on Q&A templates.
template.qa_template_des: Requires the model to output based on the predefined content, used for knowledge bases with a Q&A structure.
template.standard_strict_des: Enforces stricter requirements on the model's answers based on standard templates.
template.standard_template_des: Contains standard prompts, used for knowledge bases with no fixed structure.
template_market_description: Explore more possibilities with templates. Follow the configuration and usage guides to develop apps using templates.
test_code_incomplete: The code parsing is incomplete and cannot be tested
this_tool_requires_no_input: This tool does not require input
tool_active_manual_config_desc: The temporary secret key is stored in the app and can only be used by the app.
tool_active_system_config_price_desc: Additional price for using the secret key ({{price}} credits/call).
tool_active_system_config_price_desc_fol: Charged based on the tool usage
tool_input_param_tip: To run the plugin properly, please configure the required information.
tool_offset_tips: This tool is no longer available and will interrupt application operation. Please replace it immediately.
tool_params_description_tips: The description of parameter functions, if used as tool invocation parameters, affects the model tool invocation effect.
tool_run_free: Running the tool does not consume credits.
tool_soon_offset_tips: This tool will be offline in the future. For the sake of your business stability, please replace it as soon as possible.
tool_tip: When executed as a tool, is this field used as a tool response result?
toolkit_no_call_points: This tool does not require call points
toolkit_system_key_tip: For tools that require a key, you can configure a system key. Users can use the system key by paying points.
toolkit_token_fee_tip: After enabling this switch, users need to pay the Token points in the plugin when using it, and call points will also be charged at the same time
toolkit_promote_tags_tip: Users with the following tags will see the "Promoted" badge
toolkit_hide_tags_tip: Users with the following tags will not see this tool at all
transition_to_workflow_create_new_placeh: Create a new app instead of modifying the current one
transition_to_workflow_create_new_tip: If converted, it cannot be reverted to a simple app. Would you like to proceed?
type.Create http plugin tip: Bulk create plugins using OpenAPI schema. They must be compatible with the GPTs format.
type.Create mcp tools tip: Automatically parse the specified MCP address to bulk create callable MCP tools.
type.Create one plugin tip: Encapsulate reusable processes of a workflow, featuring custom inputs and outputs.
type.Create simple bot tip: Create a simple AI app using a template, designed for beginners.
type.Create workflow tip: Create a complex AI app capable of multi-round dialogue tasks using low-code methods, designed for advanced users.
type.Http batch tip: Bulk creation tool with OpenAPI Schema
type.Http manual tip: Create a single tool by curl or manually filling in parameters
type.Http plugin_deprecated: The HTTP plug-in is deprecated. To configure Openapi Schema, use the HTTP tool set
type.Import from json tip: Create an app by importing a JSON configuration file.
type.Import from json_error: Failed to obtain workflow data. Please check the URL or paste the JSON data.
type.Create smart customer service tip: Built-in best practice configuration. Associate with knowledge bases to quickly build a smart customer service agent.
type_not_recognized: Failed to recognize the app type.
type_plugin_description: Output the specified results with one click.
type_simple_description: The most basic conversation application, no complicated configuration is required, and it can be created and used quickly.
type_workflow_intro: Drag and drop arrangement and multiple rounds of dialogue
upload_file_exists_filtered: Duplicate files have been automatically filtered.
upload_file_max_amount_tip: The maximum number of files that can be uploaded in a chat
variable.internal_type_desc: Use only inside the workflow and will not appear in the dialog box
variable.select type_desc: The input box will be displayed in the site conversation and run preview, and this variable will not be displayed in the sharing link.

Configure global variables for a workflow. These global variables are typically used for temporary caching. Variables can be specified in the following ways:
1. Use query parameters on the chat page.
2. Use variables in the API request.
3. Use a node with the variable update tool.
workflow.form_input_tip: You can configure multiple inputs to guide users in entering specific content.
workflow.input_description_tip: Add a description to explain to users what they need to enter.
workflow.plugin_offline_error: This plugin is offline and cannot be run
workflow.plugin_soon_offline_warning: This plugin will be offline soon, please replace it as soon as possible
workflow.read_files_result_desc: A file consists of a file name and the content. Multiple files are separated by hyphens.
workflow.read_files_tip: Parse the file uploaded in the current conversation and return the result.
workflow.select_description_placeholder:
Example:
Is there any tomato in the refrigerator?
workflow.select_description_tip: Add a description to explain to users the definition of each option.
workflow.user_file_input_desc: File and image link uploaded by users
workflow.user_select_tip: You can configure multiple options for users to select during the chat. Different options direct the chat to different workflow branches.
files_cascader_no_knowledge_base: Do not add to knowledge base
files_cascader_select_first: Please select a knowledge base first.
files_cascader_dataset_empty: This knowledge base dataset is empty.
no_data_for_smart_generate: Unselectable because it contains no available data.
smart_customer_service_name_placeholder: Enter smart customer service app name
smart_customer_service_dataset_tip: Select associated knowledge bases. The smart customer service agent will answer user questions based on these knowledge bases.
smart_customer_service_rerank_model_tip: The rerank model is used to reorder retrieval results to improve answer accuracy.
smart_customer_service_rerank_model_warn: This model will be continuously trained based on app optimization to improve answer accuracy. Modification is not supported after app creation.
smart_customer_service_faq_answer_mode_t: When FAQ-type knowledge is retrieved, use the specified method to generate answers.
smart_customer_service_fallback_reply_to: Reply with the following content when no knowledge is found.
smart_customer_service_welcome_text_plac: Hello, how can I help you?
auto_learn.description: When the knowledge base is updated, this method can be used to automatically analyze documents, generate evaluation data, implement self-supervised learning, fine-tune the model and verify learning effects, enhancing the accuracy of application retrieval and recall.
auto_learn.creator: Creator
auto_learn.precision_tooltip: The proportion of correct knowledge among the top 10 retrieved knowledge. A higher ratio indicates higher recall accuracy.
auto_learn.mrr_tooltip: The ranking position of the first correct knowledge among the top 10 retrieved knowledge. The higher the ranking, the higher the score (score is 1 when ranked first, 0 when not in the top 10). It can be used to measure whether the recalled knowledge is accurate and whether the correct knowledge can be ranked at the top.
auto_learn.restore_tooltip_has_running: There are running tasks, please wait until they are completed
auto_learn.restore_confirm_content: Are you sure you want to restore the fine-tuned model to pre-learning state and clear all learning records?
rerank_model_training_warning: This model will participate in training and cannot be modified after app creation.
model_not_support_reasoning: The selected AI model does not support deep thinking.
vector_model_mismatch: Only knowledge bases with the same vector model are supported. The vector model of this knowledge base is {{model1}}, and the vector model of the selected knowledge base is {{model2}}.
auto_learn.confirm_delete_completed_reco: Are you sure you want to delete this learning record? The model fine-tuning will be reverted to the state before this learning.
auto_learn.confirm_delete_failed_record: Are you sure you want to delete this learning record?
